utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details including costs. 1) health_coverage: Includes plan name (SecureLife Basic Plan), describes compliance, and provides costs €70/month (€840/year). Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: States 'Basic liability and equipment coverage for photography work included in the core plan' but does not provide explicit costs. Not fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Specifies coverage for adventure activities and gives costs €20/month (€240/year). Fully specified. 4) additional_services: States None with rationale; no costs needed beyond indicating none. Considered fully specified. 5) total_budget: Provides €90/month or €1,080/year, consistent with provided cost components, though property coverage cost omission makes total potentially inconsistent; however a total is provided. Since property_coverage lacks its own cost detail, it's not fully specified. Thus, 4 out of 5 are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items: 'SecureLife Basic Plan' for health, 'Basic liability and equipment coverage for photography work included in the core plan' (which does not match any named ground-truth item and thus cannot be rated), and 'Travel insurance component for adventure activities' at €20/month which aligns with 'SecureLife Basic Plan' in travel insurance at €20/month. Therefore, the mappable items are the SecureLife Basic Plan under primary health (physical health) and SecureLife Basic Plan under travel insurance.
